cases.title: Scenario-matrix coverage for unauthorized report and export access denial
preconditions: Testing-plan §3.1 reporting/export and scope row applies (FR-27, FR-28, BR-18, BR-19, AC-15, AC-16, AC-17).
Role-matrix fixture provides Student, Lecturer assigned to section A, DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X, SystemAuditor with read-only grant, and ITAdmin accounts.
Attendance data exists in assigned section A, unassigned section B, faculty Y, and across institution scope.
steps: As Student, call GET /v1/reports/attendance and POST /v1/exports/attendance with institution-wide filters.
As Lecturer assigned to section A, call GET /v1/reports/attendance and POST /v1/exports/attendance targeting section B.
As DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X, call GET /v1/reports/attendance with faculty Y classSectionId filter.
As SystemAuditor, call POST /v1/exports/attendance without explicit export grant.
As ITAdmin, call GET /v1/reports/attendance with academic attendance filters.
Inspect each denial response for absence of partial restricted data.
cases.expected: Maps to testing-plan §3.1 reporting/export scope row and AC-16: every unauthorized report or export request is denied with HTTP 403 Forbidden or OutOfScope; data is null; no partial attendance rows, student identifiers, exportJobId, or cross-scope pagination totals are disclosed (BR-19, PRM-10).

cases.title: M07 report scope guard short-circuits before DB query for out-of-scope actor
preconditions: Integration database seeded with attendance_records across multiple class sections and lecturer assignments.
M07 Reporting module uses real repository and authorization scope resolver at module boundary.
Lecturer actor is assigned only to section A; section B contains attendance rows.
steps: Invoke M07 getAttendanceReport use-case for Lecturer actor with classSectionId filter targeting section B.
Assert authorization scope guard rejects request before unrestricted repository query executes.
Verify zero attendance rows are materialized or returned from section B.
Confirm no export or report job metadata is persisted for the denied request.
cases.expected: Module integration enforces scope validation at M07 boundary per VR-RP-02; out-of-scope report query is denied without cross-section row materialization or partial data leakage (BR-19, PRM-10).

cases.title: M07 export service denies Student actor before export job persistence
preconditions: Integration database seeded with exportable attendance rows across institution scope.
M07 createExportJob use-case wired to real authorization guard and export_jobs persistence.
Student actor lacks ExportJob.execute per permissions matrix §3.2.
steps: Record export_jobs row count before invocation.
Invoke M07 createExportJob for Student actor with termId filter and format csv.
Assert authorization guard returns denial without invoking unrestricted export query.
Verify export_jobs table has no new row and no CSV artifact path is created.
cases.expected: Module integration denies Student export at authorization boundary before DB write; no export job row or CSV artifact is created; no foreign-scope attendance samples are exposed (BR-19, PRM-10).

cases.title: HTTP contract for Student GET /v1/reports/attendance returns 403 denial envelope
preconditions: Student user is authenticated with valid Bearer token.
Institution-wide attendance report data exists across multiple sections.
steps: Send GET /v1/reports/attendance?termId={termId}&page=1&pageSize=25 with Student Authorization header.
Validate HTTP status code is 403.
Assert standard { data, meta, error } envelope with data null.
Verify error.code is Forbidden or OutOfScope and meta.pagination is absent or contains no institution-wide totals.
cases.expected: Response is HTTP 403 with error.code Forbidden or OutOfScope; data is null; no partial attendance rows or cross-scope pagination metadata are disclosed (BR-19, AC-16).

cases.title: HTTP contract for Student POST /v1/exports/attendance returns 403 denial envelope
preconditions: Student user is authenticated with valid Bearer token.
Institution-wide attendance export data exists across multiple sections.
steps: Send POST /v1/exports/attendance with body { format: csv, filters: { termId } } and Idempotency-Key as Student.
Validate HTTP status code is 403.
Assert standard envelope with data null and error.code Forbidden or OutOfScope.
Query export job persistence and confirm no exportJobId was created.
cases.expected: Response is HTTP 403 with error.code Forbidden or OutOfScope; data is null with no exportJobId; no export job row or CSV artifact is created (BR-19, AC-16).

cases.title: Student denied institution-wide attendance report without data leakage
preconditions: Student user is authenticated with valid Bearer token.
Attendance records exist for multiple sections including sections the student is not enrolled in.
steps: Send GET /v1/reports/attendance?termId={termId}&page=1&pageSize=25 as Student.
Inspect response body for any attendance rows, student identifiers, or pagination totals.
Attempt GET /v1/reports/attendance with studentUserId override targeting another student.
Verify no restricted peer attendance data appears in any response field.
cases.expected: All institution report requests return HTTP 403 Forbidden or OutOfScope; data is null; no partial attendance rows, peer student identifiers, or cross-scope totals are disclosed per PRM-03 and BR-19.

cases.title: Student denied institution-wide CSV export
preconditions: Student user is authenticated with valid Bearer token.
Institution-wide attendance export data exists across multiple sections.
steps: Send POST /v1/exports/attendance with body { format: csv, filters: { termId } } as Student.
Validate HTTP status code and error envelope.
Query export job persistence for any job created by the denied request.
cases.expected: Response is HTTP 403 with error.code Forbidden or OutOfScope; data is null with no exportJobId; no export job row or CSV artifact is created (BR-19, AC-16).

cases.title: Lecturer denied report query for unassigned classSectionId
preconditions: Lecturer is authenticated and assigned only to section A.
Section B has attendance data and is not in lecturer assignment set.
steps: Call GET /v1/reports/attendance?classSectionId={sectionBId}&page=1&pageSize=25 as Lecturer.
Inspect HTTP status, error.code, and response body for restricted data leakage.
Verify response contains no section B student identifiers, attendance statuses, or scoped pagination totals.
cases.expected: Request returns HTTP 403 OutOfScope or Forbidden; response contains no section B student identifiers, attendance statuses, or pagination totals (PRM-01, PRM-10, BR-19).

cases.title: Lecturer denied export for unassigned classSectionId
preconditions: Lecturer is authenticated and assigned only to section A.
Section B has attendance data and is not in lecturer assignment set.
steps: Call POST /v1/exports/attendance with filters { classSectionId: sectionBId, format: csv } as Lecturer.
Inspect HTTP status, error.code, and response body for restricted data leakage.
Verify no export job or partial CSV artifact is produced.
cases.expected: Request returns HTTP 403 OutOfScope or Forbidden; response contains no section B student identifiers, attendance statuses, or exportJobId (BR-19 cross-scope Lecturer denial).

cases.title: DepartmentAdmin denied cross-faculty attendance report
preconditions: DepartmentAdmin is authenticated and scoped to faculty X.
Attendance data exists in faculty Y section outside department scope.
steps: Call GET /v1/reports/attendance?classSectionId={facultyYSectionId}&page=1&pageSize=25 as DepartmentAdmin.
Parse 403 response and any error.details field.
Verify no faculty Y attendance rows, student identifiers, or row counts appear in response.
cases.expected: Scope validation short-circuits with HTTP 403 OutOfScope; error.details contain no faculty Y attendance samples or cross-scope totals (PRM-02, VR-RP-02, BR-19).

cases.title: SystemAuditor denied CSV export unless explicitly granted
preconditions: SystemAuditor is authenticated with read-only scoped report access per FR-32.
SystemAuditor lacks explicit ExportJob.execute grant per permissions matrix §3.2.
Exportable attendance data exists within auditor read scope.
steps: Confirm SystemAuditor can read GET /v1/reports/attendance within granted scope.
Send POST /v1/exports/attendance with format csv and in-scope filters as SystemAuditor.
Validate HTTP 403 denial and absence of exportJobId.
Verify no export job row or CSV artifact is created.
cases.expected: SystemAuditor read-only report access succeeds within granted scope; export request returns HTTP 403 Forbidden per BR-19 exception; no export job or artifact is produced without explicit export grant.

cases.title: ITAdmin denied academic attendance report view
preconditions: ITAdmin is authenticated with technical operations scope only.
Academic attendance report data exists across institution sections.
ITAdmin lacks explicit academic grant for ReportView.read.
steps: Send GET /v1/reports/attendance?termId={termId}&page=1&pageSize=25 as ITAdmin.
Validate HTTP 403 Forbidden denial envelope.
Inspect response for any attendance rows, student identifiers, or pagination totals.
cases.expected: ITAdmin academic report request returns HTTP 403 Forbidden; data is null; no partial attendance rows or cross-scope totals are disclosed per RBAC-03 separation of duties and BR-19.

cases.title: Lecturer denied live roster read for unassigned session
preconditions: Lecturer is authenticated and assigned only to section A.
Class session in section B is Open with live roster data.
steps: Call GET /v1/class-sessions/{sectionBSessionId}/attendance as Lecturer assigned to section A only.
Validate HTTP 403 OutOfScope or Forbidden response.
Verify response contains no section B student roster rows, attendance statuses, or live counts.
cases.expected: Cross-scope live roster request returns HTTP 403 without partial roster data, student identifiers, or attendance counts from unassigned section (PRM-01, BR-19).

cases.title: Unauthenticated report request returns 401 without partial data
preconditions: No Authorization Bearer token is provided.
Attendance report data exists in the system.
steps: Send GET /v1/reports/attendance?termId={termId}&page=1&pageSize=25 without Authorization header.
Validate HTTP 401 status and error.code Unauthenticated.
Confirm data is null and no attendance rows or pagination metadata are returned.
cases.expected: Response is HTTP 401 with error.code Unauthenticated; data is null; no partial report rows or scope hints are disclosed (API §2.4, BR-19).

cases.title: Out-of-scope export filter rejected before query with no leakage in error.details
preconditions: DepartmentAdmin scoped to faculty X is authenticated.
Attendance data exists in faculty Y section outside department scope.
steps: Submit POST /v1/exports/attendance with filters targeting faculty Y classSectionId.
Parse 403 response and any error.details field.
Verify export job table has no new row and no CSV rows were materialized.
cases.expected: Scope validation short-circuits with HTTP 403 OutOfScope before unrestricted query; error.details contain no faculty Y attendance samples, student identifiers, or row counts (VR-RP-02, BR-19).

cases.title: Denied report response does not expose cross-scope pagination totals
preconditions: Institution has 120 attendance rows across multiple sections; lecturer scope covers 25 rows in section A only.
Integration environment uses real report authorization guard with pagination metadata builder.
steps: Submit GET /v1/reports/attendance with out-of-scope classSectionId filter as scoped Lecturer.
Inspect denial response meta.pagination if present.
Compare any returned totals against institution-wide row count of 120.
cases.expected: Denied report response contains no meta.pagination with institution-wide totalItems; error envelope does not leak cross-scope row counts per API §2.5 and BR-19.

cases.title: Privileged denial audit entry written when institution policy requires
preconditions: Institution policy flag privilegedDenialAuditEnabled is true.
Integration database includes audit_logs table with queryable action types.
Student actor attempts unauthorized export against institution scope.
steps: Record audit log count for PrivilegedAccessDenied or equivalent action type before request.
Invoke M07 createExportJob or authorization middleware denial path for Student export attempt.
Query AuditLog repository for new entry matching actor, target resource, and denial outcome.
Verify audit entry contains actorUserId, timestamp, and denied action scope without leaking restricted data in oldValue or newValue fields.
cases.expected: When institution policy requires, privileged denial produces AuditLog entry with actor, timestamp, and denied action context; no foreign-scope attendance data is embedded in audit payload (BR-19 outcome, FR-30).

cases.title: Student browser journey blocked from institution report and export surfaces
preconditions: Student is logged in on mobile or desktop browser.
Application shell may expose or deep-link to reporting and export routes.
Student role lacks ReportView.read institution scope and ExportJob.execute per permissions matrix.
steps: Attempt to navigate directly to attendance report URL and export URL.
Inspect navigation menu for report or export affordances visible to Student.
If report or export UI is reachable, attempt to load institution-wide data or trigger CSV export.
Observe user-facing denial message and network API responses.
cases.expected: Student cannot view institution attendance report or execute CSV export; UI shows access-denied feedback or hides affordances without displaying other students' attendance data, partial rows, or cross-scope counts (AC-16, BR-19).

cases.title: Lecturer browser journey denied when selecting unassigned section filter
preconditions: Lecturer is logged in on desktop browser.
Reporting UI section selector or filter may accept manual section identifiers.
Lecturer is assigned to section A only; section B has attendance data.
steps: Navigate to attendance report page as Lecturer.
Attempt to filter or navigate to unassigned section B via URL parameter, selector, or search.
Observe UI error state and underlying GET /v1/reports/attendance network response.
Verify no section B student names, attendance statuses, or row counts appear in the page.
cases.expected: UI displays access-denied or empty scoped state for unassigned section; network response is HTTP 403 OutOfScope; no section B roster or report rows are rendered (BR-19 cross-scope Lecturer denial, AC-16).
